title: Set default storage options from mounts.conf file.
body:
We were never loading the storage.conf file to grab mountOptions.

This is causing us to not use metacopyup option when running with
overlay.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM, can/should we get this into 1.0?
It would be nice, but it does not break any functionality that I know of.  (UserNS Is slower because of it, if someone sets metacopyup.

If you add mounts options like
```
grep mountopt /etc/containers/storage.conf
# mountopt specifies comma separated list of extra mount options
mountopt = "nodev,metacopy=on"
```
podman 1.0
```
# podman run -ti fedora mount | grep overlay
overlay on / type overlay (rw,relatime,context="system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c805,c831",lowerdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/5BJHKWFRY3BDN4VM6UJ2E7VV35,upperdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/7b4a20e4e2072033bfccf04c95e43116cd15d81f7951c48696aac96b3460e440/diff,workdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/7b4a20e4e2072033bfccf04c95e43116cd15d81f7951c48696aac96b3460e440/work)
```
podman 1.0 with patch
```
# ./bin/podman run -ti fedora mount | grep overlay
overlay on / type overlay (rw,nodev,relatime,context="system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c572,c621",lowerdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/5BJHKWFRY3BDN4VM6UJ2E7VV35,upperdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/c442bc6a8a31614cbe4cc91de04230756b51a04eb4c6bb56be9e11d9d90bcd28/diff,workdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/c442bc6a8a31614cbe4cc91de04230756b51a04eb4c6bb56be9e11d9d90bcd28/work,metacopy=on)
```

Notice the nodev, and metacopy=on options should up on the mount point.
We already have a 1.0 tag, so it's too late for this to land in 1.0. If we backport, we can potentially cut a 1.0.1 with misc fixes.
